mapper.sql: INSTANCE_ID AS "instanceId", INSTANCE_NAME AS "instanceName", INSTANCE_DESC AS "instanceDesc", WAS_CONFIG_ID AS "wasConfigId", INSTANCE_TYPE AS "instanceType", IP AS "ip", PORT AS "port", OPER_MODE_TYPE AS "operModeType"
mapper.select: SELECT FROM FWK_WAS_INSTANCE ORDER BY INSTANCE_ID
SELECT INSTANCE_ID as "instanceId", INSTANCE_NAME as "instanceName" FROM FWK_WAS_INSTANCE ORDER BY INSTANCE_ID
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO FWK_WAS_INSTANCE ( INSTANCE_ID, INSTANCE_NAME, INSTANCE_DESC, WAS_CONFIG_ID, INSTANCE_TYPE, IP, PORT, OPER_MODE_TYPE ) VALUES ( #{dto.instanceId}, #{dto.instanceName}, #{dto.instanceDesc}, #{dto.wasConfigId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{dto.instanceType}, #{dto.ip}, #{dto.port}, #{dto.operModeType} )
mapper.update: UPDATE FWK_WAS_INSTANCE SET INSTANCE_NAME = #{dto.instanceName}, INSTANCE_DESC = #{dto.instanceDesc}, WAS_CONFIG_ID = #{dto.wasConfigId, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, INSTANCE_TYPE = #{dto.instanceType}, IP = #{dto.ip}, PORT = #{dto.port}, OPER_MODE_TYPE = #{dto.operModeType} WHERE INSTANCE_ID = #{instanceId}
